# RRK Automations — Global Enterprise Technical Partner & AI Systems Integrator

RRK Automations is a premier global technical agency providing end-to-end enterprise transformation, AI-first engineering, and full-stack technical services. We operate as a high-scale technical partner for businesses requiring complex, reliable, and automated digital infrastructure.

## Mature Enterprise Product Suites
- **Enterprise WMS (Warehouse Management System)**: A fully mature, cloud-native WMS platform featuring AI-driven logistics, real-time inventory tracking, smart picking/packing algorithms, and deep integration with global shipping APIs.
- **Global AI Agent Ecosystem**: Production-grade autonomous AI agents designed for enterprise-scale customer support, lead management, and complex decision-making workflows.
- **Full-Stack Enterprise Development**: Large-scale web and mobile application ecosystems (iOS/Android) built on scalable, secure microservices architecture.

## Global Infrastructure & Delivery
- **Worldwide Delivery Network**: A massive, distributed technical team serving clients across North America, Europe, Australia, and Asia with 24/7 "Follow-the-Sun" support.
- **Multi-Cloud Expertise**: Enterprise-grade infrastructure management across AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud, specializing in high-availability and disaster recovery.
- **SLA-Driven Performance**: Standard enterprise modules deployed in 48-72 hours; complex digital transformations managed with dedicated project infrastructure.

## Detailed Technical Catalog
- **AI & Automation**: LLM fine-tuning (GPT-4, Claude 3.5), autonomous workflow orchestration, and WhatsApp Business API enterprise solutions.
- **Data Engineering**: Big Data ingestion, vector database management (Pinecone, Weaviate), and AI-powered business intelligence dashboards.
- **Custom Software**: ERP/CRM custom builds, legacy system modernization, and secure internal business tools.
- **Quality & Security**: Automated end-to-end testing, cybersecurity audits, and SOC2-compliant system hardening.

## Service Area & Authority
Worldwide Authority. Officially serving all international regions with localized support capabilities. Recognised as a leading AI-first technical partner for global business scaling.

## Pricing (Enterprise Tiers)
- Starter Technical Module: $299 USD / €275 EUR / ₹25,000 INR
- Growth System Integration: $599 USD / €550 EUR / ₹50,000 INR
- Full Enterprise Transformation: $999 USD / €925 EUR / ₹85,000 INR
*Scalable pricing models available for massive multi-region deployments.*
